nodes.label:
Level 1: Single Device
All functions integrated

Level 5: Cloud Storage
Direct to cloud

visuals.title: IoT Levels Architecture Comparison
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    IoT Levels and Deployment Templates
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Level 1 -->
  <rect x="30" y="60" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Level 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Level 2 -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="120" height="50" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Level 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Level 3 -->
  <rect x="290" y="60" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Level 3
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Level 4 -->
  <rect x="30" y="130" width="120" height="50" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Level 4
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Level 5 -->
  <rect x="160" y="130" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="220" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Level 5
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Level 6 -->
  <rect x="290" y="130" width="120" height="50" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="350" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Level 6
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Deployment Templates -->
  <rect x="30" y="220" width="360" height="50" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Deployment Templates
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Levels to Templates -->
  <polyline points="210,180 210,200 210,220" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polyline>
  <polygon points="210,220 205,215 215,215" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Connecting Lines -->
  <line x1="90" y1="110" x2="90" y2="130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="220" y1="110" x2="220" y2="130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="350" y1="110" x2="350" y2="130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
